citations.text: AI4K12 Initiative (2020-2022). Five Big Ideas in Artificial Intelligence, Grade Band Progression Charts. A joint project of AAAI and CSTA, funded by NSF award DRL-1846073.

statement.en: Demonstrate knowledge of the structure of language through tasks such as generating plausible and implausible novel words, or reordering the words in a scrambled sentence so that it makes sense.
